Text: The situations that arise towards the latter part of pregnancy frequently represent the most tragic and difficult choices for families.
examples: The kinds of cases that fall at the end of pregnancy are often the most heartbreaking, painful decisions for families to make.

Text: They attempted it with Franklin Roosevelt, Harry Truman, and John Kennedy.
examples: They tried it with Franklin Roosevelt and Harry Truman and John Kennedy.

Text: I assume it's due to you forfeiting your ability to guide their thoughts.
examples: I guess it's because you will lose your right to tell them what to think.

Text: This isn't the appropriate path for us.
examples: That's not the right course for us.

Text: Did the individual commit the offense?
examples: Is the person guilty of the crime?

Text: In my opinion, this Republican administration has been primarily about flair and grand displays, lacking genuine substance.
examples: Well I think this Republican administration has been almost all style, and spectacular, and not substance.

Text: By Christmas, have your plans assembled, prepared to act when Congress is in session, and secure those objectives.
examples: Now, put together your plans by Christmas, be ready to go when Congress goes, nail these things.

Text: The President recently stated that his administration is reducing in size.
examples: The President just said that his government is shrinking.

Text: Thus, this constitutes a significant danger.
examples: So this is a serious threat.

Text: I wish for the federal government to prioritize school improvement as the top goal, in line with local governance and new accountability measures, so that Caley has a place in a classroom to learn.
examples: I want the federal government, consistent with local control and new accountability, to make improvement of our schools the number one priority so Caley will have a desk and can sit down in a classroom where she can learn.

Text: I won't accept someone suggesting that just because something was shouted at a rally -- there have been many remarks at your rallies, Senator Obama, that I'm not pleased with either.
examples: And I'm not going to stand for somebody saying that because someone yelled something at a rally -- there's a lot of things that have been yelled at your rallies, Senator Obama, that I'm not happy about either.

Text: The birther falsehood was deeply damaging.
examples: And the birther lie was a very hurtful one.

Text: My argument to the American people is, if contentment with inaction is your choice, remain with the prevailing situation.
examples: And my case to the American people is, if you're happy with inactivity, stay with the horse.

Text: We are committed to making every effort to enhance the adoption system in this country.
examples: We'll do everything we can to improve adoption in this country.

Text: My only interest is in hearing debates on whether it's beneficial or harmful to society—does it align with moral principles?
examples: I want to hear only arguments as to whether it is good or bad for the people -- is it morally right?

Text: Similar to how we addressed the apartheid envoys from South Africa.
examples: The same way we treated the apartheid diplomats of South Africa.

Text: The atmosphere in Washington is filled with excessive resentment.
examples: There's too much bitterness in Washington.
